lightsail.staticip.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Lightsail::StaticIp` resource specifies a static IP that can be attached to an Amazon Lightsail instance that is in the same AWS Region and Availability Zone.

lightsail.staticip.AttachedTo.Description: The instance that the static IP is attached to.

lightsail.staticip.StaticIpName.Description: The name of the static IP.
